mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stocks (item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, quantity) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{spaceId}, #{shelfId}, #{boxId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, quantity, created_at FROM stocks WHERE shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, quantity, created_at FROM stocks WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL
SELECT s.id, s.external_id, i.name AS item_name, s.quantity FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.box_id = #{boxId}
SELECT s.id, s.external_id, i.name AS item_name, s.quantity FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND s.box_id IS NULL
SELECT s.id, s.external_id, i.name AS item_name, s.quantity FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.shelf_id IS NULL
